full_text:
Li Xian 李暹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Xian (李暹). Helped his uncle Li Jue smuggle out the Emperor. Killed by Xu Chu. Li Xian was affiliated with Li Jue.
